name: Roughrider Coin
launchPhaseDetail: IC unanimously approved bank-to-bank pilot March 25; risk rated low-to-moderate; 10 local banks interested; cost-neutral model; September 2026 on track; Fiserv contract entering finalization

featuredContent.title: Bank of North Dakota and Fiserv Partner to Launch Roughrider Coin
featuredContent.description: North Dakota's first stablecoin — fully USD-backed, built on Fiserv's digital asset platform, targeting bank-to-bank transactions for 2026 launch.

featuredContent.title: North Dakota Moves Forward With Stablecoin as Local Banks Express Interest
featuredContent.description: Post-IC-vote deep dive: risk rated low-to-moderate, cost-neutral model, 10 banks interested, Fiserv contract entering finalization.

milestones.title: Bank of North Dakota announces Roughrider Coin
milestones.description: North Dakota's first stablecoin, targeting bank-to-bank transactions for state banking system.

milestones.title: Fiserv confirmed as technology and platform partner
ND Industrial Commission to review stablecoin pilot at March 25 meeting
milestones.description: Review includes utilization plan, risk assessment, safeguards, and cost projections. September 2026 launch pending approval.

milestones.title: ND Industrial Commission unanimously approves bank-to-bank use case
milestones.description: 10 local banks express pilot interest; risk rated 'low to moderate'; project cost-neutral; September 2026 launch reaffirmed; Fiserv contract finalization underway.
